title: NLP-019-how-do-you-handle-out-of-vocabulary-oov-words原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-019 How do you handle out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words?

 19. How do you handle out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words?
答案要点:
策略:
1. Subword Tokenization:
   - BPE (Byte-Pair Encoding)
   - WordPiece (BERT 使用)
   - SentencePiece
2. Character-level Embeddings
3. FastText: 子词信息
4. UNK Token: 统一未知词标记

质量评分: 92/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
